rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday 15, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, LLC's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to correct contradictions in paragraph 88 and 89 verses 16 and 86 and prayer for relief and request for Judicial Notice exhibit A Wells Fargo original lender. = (501/REQ)
